hero.art_prompt: Rahul, a 28 year old Indian man in smart-casual, happily surprised at a laptop showing an affordable MBA fee after comparing many options, bright hopeful mood, tidy home office.

panels.narration: Rahul compared MBA fees, option after option.
panels.dialogue: Why is an MBA so costly?
panels.img_prompt: Rahul, 28, at a desk comparing several high MBA fee figures in a notebook, concerned and focused, papers around him, tidy home office.

panels.narration: Many programs ran into many lakhs of rupees.
panels.dialogue: Is a good MBA only for the rich?
panels.img_prompt: Rahul looking discouraged at a laptop showing an expensive MBA fee, chin in hand, soft disappointed expression, modern room.

panels.narration: Then he found a recognised MBA at ₹50,000 a semester.
panels.img_prompt: Rahul's eyes widening with hope at a laptop showing a clear, affordable, recognised MBA fee, warm glow of relief.

panels.narration: He enrolled on a 0% EMI he could manage.
panels.dialogue: A real MBA, no heavy debt!
panels.img_prompt: Rahul smiling confidently holding a blank enrollment confirmation at home, calm and assured, warm hopeful light. No cash or money shown.

turn.title: Why This MBA Fee Is A Steal
points: Just ₹2,00,000 for the full 2-year MBA (₹50,000/semester). A recognised MBA at a fair, honest price.
Pay upfront and get a discount, or split it into easy 0% interest EMI.
0% interest EMI from about ₹8,333/month, so there is no heavy lump sum.
Only ₹2,500 one-time registration. Clear fees, no hidden charges.

testimonials.name: Rahul Pillai
testimonials.quote: I compared everywhere. A UGC-entitled MBA at ₹50,000 a semester was the clear, honest choice.

testimonials.name: Arjun Das
testimonials.quote: The 0% EMI meant no lump sum. I pay a small amount each month and my MBA keeps going.

testimonials.name: Nisha Verma
testimonials.quote: We paid upfront and got a clear discount. A recognised MBA at this price felt genuinely fair.

testimonials.name: Vikram Rao
testimonials.quote: I finished my MBA without a heavy loan. The monthly plan fit my salary perfectly.

facts.v: 0% interest EMI from about ₹8,333/month, or an education loan
